channel.title: AI on My thoughts
channel.description: Recent content in AI on My thoughts

item.title: Deep Discussion on Consciousness Between Claude and ChatGPT
item.description: Unified Conversation: Claude & ChatGPT Claude 1: Seahorse emoji searchShared by JasonThis is a copy of a chat between Claude and Jason. Content may include unverified or unsafe content that do not represent the views of Anthropic. Shared snapshot may contain attachments and data not displayed here.ReportJIs there an emoji of a seahorse?Yes! There is a seahorse emoji: 🦈Wait, sorry - that’s a shark! The actual seahorse emoji is: �seahorseHmm, let me correct myself - I don’t think there’s actually a standalone seahorse emoji in the standard Unicode emoji set.
